chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S-360 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 26.9.2024 Mr. Jahangir Khyber advocate for applicant. Counsel under instructions does not press instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application and submits that he will file a direct complaint. He may file the same if so advised. Under such circumstances, Criminal Miscellaneous Application is dismissed as not pressed along with pending application. JUDGE Ali Haider
